title: viola glabella
intro: Viola glabella, also known as bird's eye violet or bird's eye pansy, is a perennial plant that belongs to the violet family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Viola glabella include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve pain and reduce inflammation, and also its potential to act as an antioxidant. Viola glabella can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
